title: Dynamic-answer subsystem (officeholder/state items) + 'verify current' affordance + lookup
context: Officeholder and state-dependent civics answers (e.g., current President/senators/governor/representative) go stale and must never ship as a single static correct answer. This subsystem backs such items with a maintained, state/date-keyed lookup and a 'verify current' affordance pointing to the official source.
objective: Build the dynamic-answer subsystem and the 'verify the current answer' affordance with an official-source pointer and a maintained lookup, passing the staleness test.
acceptanceCriteria: Officeholder/state-dependent items (e.g., current President/senators/governor/representative) are never shipped as a single static correct answer

App renders a 'verify the current answer for your state/today' affordance with an official-source pointer; a maintained lookup keyed by state/date backs it; short re-verification cadence + on-change refresh; staleness test passes
